mapper.select: select interface_url as interfacePath, request_method as requestMethod, count(*) as total, sum(case when success=1 then 1 else 0 end ) as success, sum(case when success=0 then 1 else 0 end ) as fail, round(sum(case when success=1 then 1 else 0 end ) / count(*) * 100, 2) as successRate, round(avg(cost_time), 2) as avgCost, max(cost_time) as maxCost from interface_log ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select user_id as userId, count(*) as totalCall, count(distinct interface_url) as interfaceCount, round(avg(cost_time), 2) as avgCost, round(sum(case when success=1 then 1 else 0 end ) / count(*) * 100, 2) as successRate, max(create_time) as lastCallTime from interface_log ${ew.customSqlSegment}
